steps.name: project-bootstrap
steps.summary: Next.js 15 + TS strict + Tailwind v3.4.19 + pnpm 10.33 + vitest 스캐폴딩 완료. app/ 루트에 src/{app,components,lib,services/{crawlers,parser},data,types} + scripts/ + __fixtures__/ 디렉토리. .env.example 은 Amadeus 제거 상태. AC 4종(install/build/test/lint) 통과. 기존 .env.local 은 사용자가 16:37 에 미리 배치한 것으로 .gitignore 가 커버.

steps.name: supabase-schema-seed
steps.summary: migrate.sql 7테이블 + RLS anon_read_* 7정책 실 Supabase 적용. baseline_seed.json 57엔트리(17×FSC/LCC/mixed + 3장거리×FSC/mixed), airlines.json 30, airports.json 31(ADR-017 별명). psql 없어서 scripts/migrate.ts(pg) + backfill.ts(@supabase/supabase-js) TS runner 로 대체. DSN 자동 정규화(db-config.ts)로 pooler 리라이트. ARCHITECTURE.md 의 partial index now() predicate 는 IMMUTABLE 제약으로 제거(docs 버그, 별도 기록).

steps.name: lib-foundations
steps.summary: types/deal.ts (RouteMarketData.source='seed'|'observed' 전용, BaselineSeedEntry export) + src/lib/ 9개 (db, tz, airport-aliases, route-map, airlines, dedupe, format, share-token, skyscanner-url). 104개 vitest 테스트 통과. db.ts 는 import 'server-only' + server-only 패키지 설치 + vitest alias shim. dedupe 는 crypto sha1, share-token 은 timingSafeEqual.

steps.name: ppomppu-crawler-parser
steps.summary: services/crawlers/ppomppu.ts (순수 함수, ALLOWED_PATHS enforced, 1s spacing, no author) + services/parser/rules.ts (fail-soft, 500-char body cut) + 3 fixtures (ppomppu-list, ppomppu-detail, parser-golden 42케이스). node-html-parser 7.1 추가. 전체 162 vitest 통과, parser-golden 커버리지 42/42=100% (PRD Core 목표 60%↑).

steps.name: baseline-scorer-pipeline
steps.summary: services/baseline.ts (ADR-011 5단계 전수 테스트) + lib/scorer.ts (FSC/LCC 분기 + confidence=low 시 hotDeal=false) + services/verifier.ts (HEAD only, 5s AbortController) + scripts/{crawl,verify,cost_check}.ts 파이프라인 + 관측 재집계. 197/197 tests 통과. 실제 뽐뿌 crawl: saved=0 (사용자 .env.local CRAWLER_USER_AGENT 에 한글 → Node fetch ByteString 에러 → step 3 fail-soft 로 graceful 종료. 시연 전 UA 를 latin-1-safe 영문으로 교체 필요).

steps.name: ui-core
steps.summary: Core UI 13 컴포넌트 (Header·Hero·DealCard·DealList·SourceTag·CurationLine·CrawlerHealth·StaleBanner·CacheOnlyBanner·EmptyState·FilterBar·PriceBadge·ShareButton) + lib/filters.ts + layout·page·globals.css·tailwind.config 확장. 216 tests 통과, UI slop 위반 0건, Stretch 파일(MarketCard/MarketHeatmap/CommunityPicks/Sparkline/RouteFrequency) 0건, state-lib import 0건. FilterBar 는 useSearchParams+router.replace+300ms debounce(ADR-007), PriceBadge 는 button+preventDefault+stopPropagation 모바일 tap 충돌 방지. dev 서버 200, robots noindex, EmptyState 정상 렌더 (deals 0건).

steps.name: middleware-api-readme
steps.summary: src/middleware.ts (runtime=nodejs, share_token → cookie → BasicAuth → 401 WWW-Authenticate, X-Robots-Tag + Cache-Control: private on pass) + src/app/api/{deals,health}/route.ts (lib/filters.ts + anon client 재사용) + 3개 GH Actions workflows (crawl 15m, verify 3h, cost_check daily, CHEAPSKY_STAGE 미설정) + app/README.md 1분 DEMO 인라인. 216/216 tests 통과. live smoke: no-token→401, token→200+noindex, /api/health 정확히 stale 리포트.
